channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Car with no number plates seems to be stolen, 18th April
item.description:
Red car has no number plates on front or rear. Possibly stolen

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: E-lime hire Bike parked Dangerously, 18th April
item.description:
E-lime hire Bike parked dangerously on Pavement on Swiss Court TWG Tea. Might Hurt somebody.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swiss Court, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on stone column of Lambeth Bridge South side, 18th April
item.description:
Lambeth side of the bridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albert Embankment, Lambeth, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti, 18th April
item.description:
Outside no 310 Bromley Road Remove graffiti from bus time table

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Southend, Greater London

item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Blocked drain, 18th April

Blocked drain

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Hill, Chislehurst, Greater London

item.title: Mattress Fly Tip, 18th April
item.description:
Mattress dumped at side of road on Altash Way.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Underwood, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent – Fly-tipping Marshgate path -Tom Cribb Road, 18th April
item.description:
Large sofa fly-tipped at the end of Mashgate Path, junction with Tom Cribb Road. Its been 2 weeks since it was left there

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tom Cribb Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign post at risk of falling causing injury near school., 18th April
item.description:
Parking Sign post at risk of causing injury or damage. The post is in front of Malswick Court Towermill Road se15, the post has been unsteady in excess of 3 years and is now at risk of falling.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Mill Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pretty clear, 18th April
item.description:
The dump always starts on the weekend. One of the items has the person’s address on it. Am I meant to speak to them about it? Shouldn’t they be warned by the Council?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Park Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken double swing, 18th April
item.description:
The double swing in the play area has started splitting along the seam where the adult seat joins the child swing. The gap is big enough for small fingers to get stuck, and is sharp.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eynsford Close, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked in my space in private parking area, 18th April
item.description:
Been here for 2 weeks and hadn’t moved

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waratah Drive, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A lot of filthy litter, bedding, etc is dumped round the back of Asda's, 18th April
item.description:
A lot of filthy litter, bedding, etc is dumped round the back of Asda's

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ramac Way, Charlton

item.title: Rubbish, 18th April
item.description:
What looks like to be a broken kids tent has been dumped on the pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shieldhall Street, Abbey Wood

item.title: 47 and 49 Brondesbury villas, 18th April
item.description:
Large cabinet and pram

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: 120 Kentish Town Road / Opposite Castle Road, 18th April
item.description:
Pedestrian Direction Signage No 02057 has been missing panels for years. It has TfL branding. Previously reported FMS No 7059021 in January 2025 ….. nothing happened!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 244, Royal College Street, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bushes along styles way need a clean, 18th April
item.description:
There is lots of dog fouling and litter in the bushes along styles way. Please could these be cleaned? Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Whitecroft Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed up car, 18th April
item.description:
Car that’s been abdodned after an accident Been left in road for about 3 months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed table all cracked up, 18th April
item.description:
The speed bump has big potential holes Hard to avoid you have to swerve to try and get over it Probably caused by the road re surfacing of the side road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Lane, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bell bollard knocked out again, 18th April
item.description:
Would be better if it was properly set in to the ground instead of sitting on top
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakfield Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
